news-global-econ.title: Dept. of Energy Fact-Checks Gavin Newsom's Clean Energy Claim: 'FALSE'
news-global-econ.description:
The U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) shot back at California Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) for making a misleading claim about his state's renewable energy usage while calling the agency's secretary an "oil shill."

news-global-econ.description: Prospective presidential candidate Sen. Elissa Slotkin (D-MI) is set to travel to Canada on Saturday for a summit with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney and other center-left politicians focused on “how to battle right-wing politicians on affordability,” as…

news-global-econ.title: Terrell Owens declares he 'couldn't care less' about the Cowboys years after tumultuous exit
news-global-econ.description: Terrell Owens reveals in a new interview that he and the Dallas Cowboys have no relationship, saying he has nothing left to say about the organization.

news-global-econ.description: Fox News chief national security correspondent Jennifer Griffin has the latest on conflict in the Strait of Hormuz on ‘The Story.’

news-thai-soc.title: Global scam crackdown leads to 276 arrests
news-thai-soc.description: A sweeping DOJ and FBI operation led to 276 arrests and dismantled nine scam centers tied to cryptocurrency fraud targeting Americans across the globe.

news-global-soc.title: Three hikers killed after climbing restricted Indonesian volcano to create online content, police say
news-global-soc.description: Mount Dukono eruption in Indonesia kills three hikers, including two Singaporeans, who authorities say entered a restricted zone despite warnings.

news-global-soc.title: French Cybercrime Authorities Elevate Investigation of Elon Musk and X to Criminal Probe
news-global-soc.description: French cybercrime prosecutors have announced that their investigation into Elon Musk and his social media platform X has been upgraded to a criminal probe, marking a significant escalation in the ongoing legal scrutiny of the tech tycoon's deepfake porn scand…

news-global-soc.title: Almost Half the 3,500 Criminals Former NC Dem Gov. Roy Cooper Released Went on to Reoffend -- and Now He's Running for Senate
news-global-soc.description:
More than one thousand criminals who were released back into the streets on former Gov. Roy Cooper's (D-NC) watch went on to reoffend, according to an analysis.

news-global-soc.title: Trump blockade squeezing Iran so hard regime may be dumping oil into Gulf, experts say
news-global-soc.description: Experts say Trump's blockade is squeezing Iran so hard the regime may be dumping excess crude into the Persian Gulf as storage capacity runs out.

news-global-soc.title: NYC business owner kickstarts million dollar campaign to combat Mamdani-driven business exodus
news-global-soc.description: Andrew Murstein pledges $1 million for Operation Boomerang, an effort to lure businesses back to NYC amid Mayor Mamdani's policies targeting the wealthy.
